item.title: Git Command Line
item.description: Complete Git Workflow and Troubleshooting Guide Basic Git Workflow 1. Initial Setup # Configure Git (do this once) git config --global user.name "Your Name" git config --global user.email "your.email@example.com" # Clone a repository git clone github.com/username/repo.git cd repo 2.

item.title: Bash
item.description: A Guide to Bash Scripting Variables store data. In Bash, there are no data types in the traditional sense; all variables are treated as strings. Defining Variables Always wrap values in quotes.

item.title: LaTeX
item.description: Basic Syntax Comments are made using %, and can also be used to ‘escape’ newline characters. There are 4 kinds of dashes. - Normal dash (hyphen) used for compound words/word splitting.

item.title: Tcl
item.description: A Practical Guide to Tcl Scripting: Syntax and Templates Tcl (Tool Command Language) is a powerful, dynamic scripting language known for its simple syntax and easy integration with ...

item.title: FPGAs, SoCs, and Development Boards
item.description: This page lists and explains the various FPGA chips and development boards available, categorised based on the producer (Xilinx, Altera, 3rd party), how much it costs, and the ease ...

item.title: PetaLinux Quick Tutorial
item.description: UG1144 - PetaLinux Tools Documentation Create a new petalinux project: petalinux-create project [-s <path-to-bsp>] --name <project-name> --template [versal|zynqMP|zynq|microblaze] ...

item.title: Vitis Quick Tutorial
item.description: Here’s the typical design and file generation flow: Petalinux platform customization tutorial ZCU104 platform creation tutorial Phase 1: Project Setup & Hardware Design ...

item.title: Landing Page
item.description: This vault discusses the following topics: FPGA chips, SoCs, and Development Boards. How to use Vivado to develop hardware applications. How to use Vitis to program processor cores and interact with the programmable fabric.
